title: hieracium chondrillifolium subsp. lantschfeldense
intro: Hieracium chondrillifolium subsp. lantschfeldense is a subspecies of the Hieracium genus, commonly known as hawkweed, a type of flowering plant native to the Alps. This plant is rich in flavonoids, particularly quercetin, and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Hieracium chondrillifolium subsp. lantschfeldense include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and health.
